notes: Small focused file (172 lines, 4 theorems) proving the translation-isogeny commutation τ_S∘φ*=φ*∘τ_{φS} in point, alg-hom, and pointwise forms, with all proofs axiom-clean and no sorry. The key machinery is IsGenuineWith (GapSpines), translateAlgEquivOfPoint_map_genericPoint (SeparableKernelTorsor), and algHom_ext_x_y_gen (TranslationOrd); the main consumer externally is SeparableWitnesses.lean.
